headline: Gift-intent is the durable, high-LTV winner; hot-sleeper softness is a seasonal JTBD shift, not a targeting failure.

segments.jtbd: Give a thoughtful, premium, low-risk gift
segments.verdict: scale — best converter, over-indexes in quiz funnel
segments.why: Highest CVR in the account and aligns with the week-4 memory that gift-intent is highest-LTV; the quiz funnel converts them ~2x the PDP.

segments.jtbd: Stop overheating at night (seasonal — peaks in summer heat)
segments.why: CVR halved as spring warms AND a competitor is contesting the cooling angle. This is a seasonal JTBD trough plus auction pressure, not broken targeting. Chasing it now is a global-optimum trap.
Best prospecting ROAS; correctly seeded on purchasers (LTV-based per ads guidance).
Wider lookalike below blended ROAS; ads rule is base lookalikes on best customers by LTV, not reach. Pull budget back toward LAL-1%.

implication: Audience is not this week's binding problem — the best segment (gift-intent) is healthy and reachable. The losses are concentrated where creative is carrying the message.
source: customer-research / Extraction Framework (JTBD + confidence labels) + ads / Audience Targeting (LTV-based lookalikes)
